description: §14.8.9 declassification — reveal("col") is the sole admit path. Wrapping the protected row in u.reveal("passwordHash") at a raw egress SUPPRESSES the E-PROTECT-004 fail-closed gate (the column is explicitly declassified-at-this-value). The strip machinery still engages (I-PROTECT-STRIP-001), but the reveal admits the named column past the sink.
rationale: §14.8.9: reveal("col") stamps the column's provenance descriptor as declassified; the sink admits a protected-origin column only when its descriptor bears a reveal stamp. It is the ONLY re-admit path and is greppable in source and emitted handler — so the raw-egress gate that would otherwise fire E-PROTECT-004 is suppressed.
